response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals across 15+ years, the role requires very specific expertise that is absent: embedded networking firmware development, network security protocol implementation (MACsec, 802.1X, attack detection), and native-level Japanese language proficiency. His C experience is limited to a brief 2014-2015 role, and his recent 7+ years focused on high-level TypeScript/Node.js development rather than embedded systems or network security.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development experience with strong emphasis on testing, code quality, and clean architecture
Demonstrated Linux familiarity and some C/C++ experience from previous roles, showing foundational embedded systems knowledge
Excellent technical communication skills and mentoring ability through workshops and speaking engagements
concerns: No experience with embedded networking firmware, network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), or embedded attack detection systems
Limited C programming background (6 months in 2014) with recent 7+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js, not embedded or systems-level development
No Japanese language proficiency listed; resume shows English, Romanian, and basic German—missing a stated required qualification

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking firmware or security expertise
Limited C programming experience; recent work in high-level languages
